series_metadata.series_description: Series contains Journal Entries (Orders) and Consent Agreements prior to August 2007.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper: Retain until scanned to machine readable format, reviewed for accuracy and completeness, and saved to CDROM . ; Electronic: Retain CDROM permanently as part of the Board''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s official journal and business records. Retain permanently and transition to new electronic format as technology requires., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
